entry.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Standardize Open-Source Robotics Pipeline via LeRobot
entry.summary: A new collaboration brings NVIDIA Isaac GR00T 1.7, Isaac Teleop, and the upcoming Cosmos 3 world model directly into Hugging Face’s LeRobot ecosystem. — Also covered by: NVIDIA Blog

entry.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
entry.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server. — Also covered by: WSJ Tech

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI agent is now available on mobile and web
entry.summary: Anthropic is rolling out its AI agent Claude Cowork to mobile and web. Until now, the feature was limited to the desktop app. The agent keeps working in the background even when the laptop is closed and pings users on their phone when it needs a decision. The move blurs the line between Chat and Cowork even further. Th

entry.title: the polysemanticity of polysemanticity in language models
entry.summary: Polysemanticity is one of the most important concepts when it comes to mechanistic interpretability, basically, studying the internal representations of neural networks. For some reason, the concept of polysemanticity seems really, really fascinating to me, mostly due to how it kind of relates to superposition in quant — Also covered by: Anthropic Research

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launches Thursday after a delay forced by the U.S. government
entry.summary: OpenAI is launching GPT-5.6 on Thursday after the U.S. government lifted its release ban following additional testing. Binding standards for future model approvals still don't exist. OpenAI says the Sol model beats Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 on coding benchmarks at about half the cost. The article OpenAI's GPT-5.6 lau

entry.title: Apple says it reached a $30B+ deal with Broadcom to produce 15B chips on US soil in the next five years, its largest pledge as part of its $600B US investments (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)
entry.summary: Rolfe Winkler / Wall Street Journal : Apple says it reached a $30B+ deal with Broadcom to produce 15B chips on US soil in the next five years, its largest pledge as part of its $600B US investments — The deal, for billions of chips, is the latest part of Apple's domestic investment pledge — Apple is ramping up its inve

entry.title: b9917: fix: OOB reads in UGM tokenizer (precompiled_charsmap handling) (#18750)
entry.summary: fix: OOB reads in UGM tokenizer (precompiled_charsmap handling) Validate minimum size (4 bytes) before reading xcda_blob_size Use strnlen with bounds check instead of unsafe strlen Both issues allow heap-buffer-overflow from malicious T5/UGM GGUF files. Replace unsafe strnlen() with a bounds-checked loop that scans for

entry.title: ollama v0.31.2 released
entry.summary: What's Changed ci: avoid unbounded parallelism by @dhiltgen in #16966 fix cuda toolkit lookup and parallel by @MarkWard0110 in #16613 docs(cloud): update retirement list by @mxyng in #17000 discover: fall back to standard CUDA when the JetPack runner is absent by @kevinpark1217 in #16949 agent: harness core by @ParthSa

entry.title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
entry.summary: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is the cheapest it’s been since before the AI boom kicked off and sent the shares into the stratosphere.

entry.title: Space Force gets first mobile high-powered electromagnetic beam weapon to cripple enemy satellites — plans to deploy 32 ‘Meadowlands’ units to detect, deny, disrupt, and degrade hostile space assets
entry.summary: Space Force has announced that the first high-energy 'Meadowlands' electronic warfare system has been delivered for operational duty.

entry.title: Sources: Chinese AI developer MiniMax is working on a 2.7T-parameter model, dubbed M3 Pro and set for release as early as Q3, and plans to open-source it (Juro Osawa/The Information)
entry.summary: Juro Osawa / The Information : Sources: Chinese AI developer MiniMax is working on a 2.7T-parameter model, dubbed M3 Pro and set for release as early as Q3, and plans to open-source it — Chinese AI developer MiniMax is working on a new large language model with 2.7 trillion parameters, larger than any other Chinese AI

entry.title: Scaling works. These researchers are betting billions it isn't enough
entry.summary: Transformers have ruled AI for a decade. But some think world models, pure reinforcement learning or neurosymbolic AI might be a better path to true intelligence

entry.title: Enterprise AI's adoption gap: investment is up, but security, data, and accountability are lagging - MarketScale
entry.summary: Enterprise AI's adoption gap: investment is up, but security, data, and accountability are lagging MarketScale

entry.title: CISA orders feds to prioritize patching Langflow auth bypass flaw
entry.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) gave federal agencies until Friday to patch an actively exploited vulnerability in the Langflow visual framework for building AI agents. [...]

entry.title: sqlite-utils 4.0, now with database schema migrations
entry.summary: This morning I released sqlite-utils 4.0 , the 124th release of that project and the first major version bump since 3.0 in November 2020. In addition to some small but significant breaking changes (described in this upgrade guide ), this version introduces three major features: database migrations , nested transactions

entry.title: QpiAI Launches Open Quantum SDK for Developers and Researchers
entry.summary: Insider Brief Press release – QpiAI, a globally leading full-stack quantum computing company, today released the QpiAI Quantum SDK as open-source software. Available now at https://github.com/qpiai/quantum-sdk, the QpiAI Quantum SDK gives developers, researchers, and startups an accessible, developer-friendly toolkit t

entry.title: Cohere Transcribe Arabic is an open-source model built for Arabic's toughest transcription problems
entry.summary: Cohere has released Transcribe Arabic, an open-source model for Arabic speech recognition that the company says outperforms Whisper and OmniASR on dialects, code-switching, and bilingual Arabic-English speech. The 2-billion-parameter model is available on Hugging Face under the Apache 2.0 license. The article Cohere Tr

entry.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
entry.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

entry.title: China’s MiniMax Plans to Launch 2.7-Trillion Parameter Model
entry.summary: https://www.theinformation.com/briefings/exclusive-chinas-minimax-plans-launch-2-7-trillion-parameter-model According to The Information, MiniMax plans to launch a new-generation large language model with 2.7 trillion parameters. Sources revealed that the internal codename for this new model is M3 Pro. It is expected t

entry.title: llama.cpp b9912 released
entry.summary: spec : fix naming, spacing ( #25410 ) macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) DISABLED macOS Intel (x64) iOS XCFramework Linux: Ubuntu x64 (CPU) Ubuntu arm64 (CPU) Ubuntu s390x (CPU) Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu arm64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu x64 (ROCm 7.2) Ubuntu x64 (OpenVINO) Ubuntu

entry.title: FirstResearch: Auditable Question Formation for LLM Scientific Discovery Agents
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.05682v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM systems for scientific discovery increasingly assist with ideation, literature synthesis, experiment planning, and report generation, but the first research question they propose can remain difficult to audit: it may sound plausible without exposing the mechanism, fal

entry.title: China's CNVD says it found "security backdoor vulnerabilities" in Claude Code that "send sensitive information" like "location and identity to remote servers" (Raffaele Huang/Wall Street Journal)
entry.summary: Raffaele Huang / Wall Street Journal : China's CNVD says it found “security backdoor vulnerabilities” in Claude Code that “send sensitive information” like “location and identity to remote servers” — It advised users to uninstall the software or update to its latest version

entry.title: US Stock Futures Slide After Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over
entry.summary: US equity futures fell as investors turned risk averse after President Donald Trump said the tentative ceasefire with Iran has ended, fueling concerns of a renewal in fighting.

entry.title: Temasek CIO: Iran Conflict Resolution Needs More Time
entry.summary: Temasek International's Chief Investment Officer Rohit Sipahimalani tells Bloomberg that it would take time to get to "some resolution" of the Iran conflict, noting that while both sides are interested in deescalation, the process will not be a straight line. (Source: Bloomberg)

entry.title: Prompt Robustness Is Task-Dependent: Comparing Objective and Belief-Style Questions in LLM Evaluation
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.05554v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Survey-style evaluations of large language models often treat a prompted response as a measure of a model's values or beliefs. This assumption is particularly fragile when responses are read as evidence of political values, social attitudes, or beliefs. We ask whether pro

entry.title: CSTutorBench: Benchmarking Small Language Models as Tutors for Block-Based Programming
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.05571v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly explored as AI tutors, yet deploying them in K-12 settings raises concerns around privacy, cost, and reliance on proprietary models. Small language models (SLMs) offer a promising alternative, but selecting the right model for a spec

entry.title: Open, convenient and predictable: Introducing Provisioned Throughput
entry.summary: Provisioned Throughput gives you reserved inference capacity for frontier open models like MiniMax M3 and GLM-5.2. Token-based pricing, a 99% uptime SLA, and up to 90% lower cost than proprietary APIs. No GPU-hour math, no infrastructure to manage.

entry.title: Design-CP: Context Parallelism for Design of Protein Nanoparticles
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.05439v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many all-atom generative protein models can in principle design large multimeric complexes by jointly modelling all chains, but their quadratic token- and atom-pair representations quickly exceed single-GPU memory as the number of chains and residues modelled grows. We in

entry.title: [Linkpost]Six Story Prompts I Want to Read
entry.summary: Below are six story prompts that you might enjoy. Especially intended for my writer friends, but hopefully other people might find it fun to try writing based on one of these prompts too! The first three prompts are about AI in one capacity or another. I think the current moment in AI, in addition to being unusually pr

entry.title: How much slower does takeoff go with 10× less compute?
entry.summary: About 6x slower in the median case, with an 80% CI of 3.5x to 8x. Setup Define the "R&D compute" (in, say, H100-equivalents) of an AGI company at a given time to be the total compute in use across the following categories: Compute used to run experiments, which are used to search for software improvements, Compute used
